data.title: Trump urges Exxon in Venezuela but strategy expert warns digital asset tracking is needed for safety. $500M initial sales brokered by White House with concerns over traditional contracts.
data.description: President Donald Trump is pushing U.S. oil companies to assist in restoring Venezuela's energy sector, emphasizing the need for the industry to embrace digital infrastructure to safeguard assets from potential expropriation. Baron Lamarre, former Petronas trading head, cautions that relying on political assurances is inadequate to protect investments. He suggests that unless a "trustless" digital system is implemented for ownership tracking, Exxon Mobil Corp. faces risks in investing in Venezuela. Amid the White House facilitating $500 million in initial sales, Lamarre, now co-founder of the International Digital Exchange (Index), highlights the insufficiency of traditional contracts in such jurisdictions. For the full story, visit a news site.

data.title: Bitcoin investors face first month of losses since late 2023, while gold reaches new highs on Tuesday amid global tensions.
data.description: On Tuesday, the price of gold reached new all-time highs due to escalating geopolitical tensions and concerns over trade wars, prompting investors to flock to safe-haven assets.

data.title: Beko Europe named Top Employer Europe 2026 for ninth year, also top employer in 8 countries for commitment to values, leadership, inclusion.
data.description: A European company has recently been acknowledged for its excellence in areas such as a strong commitment to a clear purpose and values, effective leadership, ethical practices, and fostering inclusion and diversity. This recognition was based on an impressive score of 85%. The company, known as Beko Europe, has showcased its dedication to maintaining high standards in various aspects of its operations. The acknowledgment was announced in Milan on January 20, 2026.

data.title: Broad Arrow to showcase iconic cars at Roland-Garros Stadium from 27-30 January 2026 and Réttromobile with key highlights like Schumacher's 1992 Benetton B192 Formula One car, and more. Display includes 1971 Lamborghini Miura P400 S, 1967 Ferrari 275 GTS, Bugatti Type 18, and others. Watch for Concorsa D'Eleganza Villa D'Este sale previews of Bugatti Type 43 Roadster and Ferrari F40.
data.description: Broad Arrow will exhibit select cars at Roland-Garros Stadium from 27 to 30 January 2026, featuring iconic vehicles like Michael Schumacher’s 1992 Benetton B192 F1 car, a 1971 Lamborghini Miura P400 S, and a 1967 Ferrari 275 GTS, alongside motorsport memorabilia. The exhibit will also include the Ex-Roland Garros Type 18 Bugatti ‘Black Bess’ from the Louwman Museum. Moreover, a preview at RéTromobile will showcase early highlights for the Concours D’Eleganza Villa D’Este sale, including a Bugatti Type 43 Roadster and a Ferrari F40. This event demonstrates the significant display of prestigious vehicles and memorabilia for enthusiasts.

data.title: Trident reports high gold grades: average of 5.73 g/t Au over 15.0m. Plans winter drill program of 10,000m at the Contact Lake Gold Project.
data.description: Vancouver, British Columbia - In a recent announcement, Trident Resources Corp. shared the outcomes of the last six diamond drill holes from the 2025 drill program at the Contact Lake Project. These holes were part of a total of 19 holes drilled during the fall of 2025, encompassing 6,838 meters. The objective of these specific holes was to explore the downward expansion of gold mineralization beneath the historically established Main Zone of the Bakos Shear Zone, known for hosting significant gold mineralization. The remarkable success of the 2025 drill program has led to the initiation of a fully-funded winter drill program for 2026 at Contact Lake, with an extensive plan to drill 10,000 meters.

data.title: Carizma Motors in Lubbock, TX offers quality used Chevrolet vehicles for reliability, performance, and value.
data.description: A dealership in Lubbock, TX, known as Carizma Motors, has recently introduced a range of pre-owned Chevrolet vehicles that emphasize reliability, performance, and value. Located in Lubbock, Texas, this dealership revealed on January 20, 2026, the arrival of a diverse collection of used Chevrolet cars.

data.title: Govt of Sri Lanka seeks EoI for divesting 100% shareholding in Canwill Holdings, parent company to Sinolanka and Helanco Hotels & Spa.
data.description: In Colombo, Sri Lanka, on January 20, 2026, the Government of Sri Lanka (GoSL) announced plans to sell off its entire stake of 100% in Canwill, which is the holding company for both Sinolanka Hotels & Spa (Pvt) Ltd (Sinolanka) and Helanco Hotels & Spa (Pvt) Ltd (Helanco). The divestiture process of these entities will be carried out by GoSL.

data.title: Whale from Satoshi era shifts 909.38 BTC after 13 years, now valued at $84.6M, highlighting Bitcoin's early potential.
data.description: Recently, an old wallet from the time of Satoshi Nakamoto has shown movement, transferring a total of 909.38 BTC. This amount is currently valued at approximately $84.6 million, shedding new light on the significant gains that early investors in Bitcoin have experienced.

data.title: Allurity appoints Henrik Brinkhagen as CEO of ID North, a specialized cybersecurity company focused on identity security.
data.description: Allurity, a European cybersecurity group, has recently appointed Henrik Brinkhagen as the CEO of ID North, a specialized cybersecurity company that focuses on identity security. This announcement was made on January 20, 2026. Brinkhagen brings a wealth of experience in leadership and strategy to this new role. This move is aimed at further strengthening ID North's position in the cybersecurity sector.

data.title: Merck and ChemLex collaborate to advance automated chemistry in Life Science and Electronics; MOU signed in Singapore and Shanghai on Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: A collaborative partnership has been formed to merge automated experimentation and advanced chemistry processes in order to expedite research and innovation in the fields of Life Science and Electronics. This strategic alliance was established in Singapore and Shanghai on January 20, 2026. Merck, a prominent player in the science and technology sector, is at the forefront of this initiative. The collaboration aims to leverage specialized capabilities to enhance efficiency and drive progress in these industries.

data.title: SmallRig debuts at CES 2026, focusing on imaging solutions and global strategy shift. Milestone event from Jan 6-9.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, in Las Vegas, SmallRig, a leading provider of imaging solutions worldwide, showcased its products at CES 2026 from January 6 to 9. This event was significant in their global strategy. They transformed the CES Booth into a Co-Creation Hub to foster collaboration with international partners and customers.

data.title: Fraud alert: Fake social media accounts impersonate HKMA regulator and Eddie Yue. Police probe ongoing. Stay cautious!
data.description: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has issued a warning to the public regarding fraudulent social media accounts pretending to be the regulator and Chief Executive Eddie Yue. The authorities are investigating the matter with the police.

data.title: Analysts predict LDO could hit $0.75-$0.85 by Feb 2026, up by 38-56%, despite current bearish trend.
data.description: According to analysts, there is a possibility for LDO to potentially increase by 38-56%, reaching a price range of $0.75 to $0.85 by February 2026. This forecast comes amidst a bearish trend, with the current price hovering close to the lower Bollinger Band support level.

data.title: Funding Circle exceeds FY 2025 revenue and profit targets, meeting 2026 goals ahead of schedule.
data.description: Funding Circle has successfully met its revenue goal for FY 2026 ahead of schedule, indicating strong performance. Additionally, the company's revenue and profit before tax for FY 2025 have surpassed initial projections, showcasing impressive financial results.

data.title: New Earth Resources to explore Red Wine REE Project in Newfoundland and Labrador. (CSE: EATH) Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on January 20, 2026, New Earth Resources Corp. (CSE: EATH) has revealed the commencement of exploration efforts on the Red Wine Rare Earth Elements (REE) project in east Newfoundland and Labrador. The company, known as New Earth, is excited to launch activities on this project.

data.title: Aave price expected to reach $184-190 by Feb 2026. Current price at $161 with neutral RSI at 43.83; bearish MACD.
data.description: Aave is currently trading at $161, with analysts predicting it could reach $190-195 by February 2026. Technical indicators reveal a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 43.83. Despite this, the bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum suggests a mixed outlook for the cryptocurrency.
Hiab to enhance operating model for scalability and focus on customers. Update on cost reduction program included.

data.title: Nxera Pharma forms Metabolic Advisory Council to develop treatments for obesity, metabolic disorders.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Nxera Pharma Co. Ltd, a company listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under the code 4565, declared the establishment of a Metabolic Advisory Council in collaboration with experts from Tokyo and Cambridge. This council aims to offer scientific, clinical, and strategic advice to Nxera as they progress their expanding portfolio of innovative treatments focused on addressing obesity and metabolic issues.

data.title: Filoplumes, small yet powerful feathers, support flights covering thousands of miles in nature's design.
data.description: Tiny filoplumes play a crucial role in facilitating nonstop flights covering distances of thousands of miles.

data.title: Houlihan Lokey acquires a controlling interest in Audere Partners, French firm, to strengthen European platform. #NYSE #business #investment
data.description: Houlihan Lokey, Inc., a global investment bank listed on NYSE as HLI, recently revealed two key transactions aimed at bolstering its European presence and enriching its global Corporate Finance business. The firm has finalized an agreement to acquire a majority stake in Audere Partners, a renowned French corporate finance entity known as Natixis Partners. This move represents a significant development for Houlihan Lokey as it seeks to expand its capabilities, marking a strategic step forward in its growth trajectory.
